nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Marketing OS web dashboard: a chat-first SPA centered on Max (virtual CMO) that guides users through 5 journey stages (discovery, diagnosis, strategy, production, operations), with API endpoints, backend setup, Telegram two-way control, real AI agent data wiring, Facebook Ads OAuth connection, and realtime SSE updates.
nodes.languageNotes: Written in Vietnamese; documents a hash-router SPA architecture plus a Starlette/SQLite backend (run_web.py) that mirrors bot/main.py's mounted API.

nodes.name: dashboard-standalone.html
nodes.summary: Single-file bundled version of the Marketing OS dashboard (HTML + inline CSS + inline JS) intended for offline use or static hosting (e.g., GitHub Pages) without requiring the backend server.
nodes.languageNotes: Inlines the same CSS custom-property design tokens found in web/styles.css, indicating it is a self-contained mirror of the modular index.html + styles.css + app.js setup.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: App shell for the Marketing OS dashboard SPA: defines the sidebar/main/rail layout skeleton, loads Chart.js, data.js, and app.js, and lets JavaScript render the hash-routed pages into #view.

nodes.name: styles.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet for the dashboard SPA defining the dark-themed design system (CSS custom properties for colors, radius, shadows) and layout/component styles used by index.html.
